MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BAY AREA QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-09-486990 WITH CASE CGC-08-482228.
APPEARANCES: Juliana Kresse, Esq. of Stanzler Funderburk & Castellon LLP 925/837-1147 for pltf Pacific Steel Casting Company & opposing party; James Wheaton, Esq. 510/208-7744 of First Amendment Project for pltf Healthy Air Coalition (in #486990) & opposing party; Susan Adams, Assistant Counsel 749-5189 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion to consolidate granted for trial only, but denied for all other purposes. Parties to obtain new trial date from presiding judge's department. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO, CSR #12353
